name: Shellfish Stew Alla Tarantina
recipeIngredient: 1 pound large shrimp, U-15 size, peeled and deveined
1 pound calamari, cleaned of skin, ink sac and beak
1 pound small clams or cockles, scrubbed and drained
1 medium red onion, chopped into 1/4-inch dice
1 red bell pepper, seeded and cored, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
1 yellow bell pepper, seeded and cored, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut calamari into 1/2-inch rings and check oysters for sand and bits of shell.
2. In a 4-quart pot, heat olive oil until smoking.
3. Add onion, peppers, and thyme leaves; cook until softened but not brown, about 10 minutes.
4. Add wine and tomato sauce; bring to a boil.
5. Add clams, shrimp, and mussels; cover the pot.
6. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes until clams have all opened. Add calamari and cook 2 minutes until opaque.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Add oysters and their liquid; simmer for 2 to 3 minutes until oysters tighten around the outer edges.
8. Divide shellfish over pieces of bread in 4 bowls and pour broth into each serving.
Yield: 4 servings
